review_text: Really peaceful stay with lovely greenery and very friendly staff. Everything needed here for a nice rest and stay

Why anybody found it a bad experience here I don’t know. Staff are extremely helpful, the facilities were clean. It’s a 40k trip into Darwin, but not too far to  Coolalinga for your shopping. We came for 4 nights and decided to stay another 5, wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again.

Well what a gem this caravan park is. We have had a campervan for just over 3 weeks and picked this place for locality to Darwin in order to drop van off. Have to say it's probably the best site we have stayed on and we have done a few between Darwin and broom. Staff very helpful and friendly,  hugh site for the van and extremely clean bathrooms. Noonamah tavern next door for food which was also excellent.  Only bit of noise was from stuarts highway but that wasn't a problem.  Highly recommend and would deffo use again.
A lovely shady place. Has a dog play area. Close to shop and fuel and tavern. Our site was tight but close to amenities.
A great park, large van sites, clean amenities and pool, pet friendly with a great dog park for your pooch to have a run

If youre after 1 or 2 nights of COMFORTABLE outback experience for caravan or lodging but still close to key ameneties, this ia the place for you. Pick the cabins between 1 to 6 so you can see can see the moon rise from thw horizon, if its full moon then even better. You can also watch the sunrise in the wide field and if theres fog then it will be a beauty. Rooms are clean and big, everything that you need is there except the laundry is outside but i notice the hallways and common rooms are clean. I hope they think about placing a screen door on the windows and main door so you can have some ventilation even without the ac - i was in cabin 4 so maybe other cabins have them
Also i hope the management also considers setting up smart tvs so we can cast our devices. Other that my stay was surpriaingly comfortable.

We needed to stay the night somewhere urgently and the lady accommodated to our needs instantly. The cabins were AMAZINGLY clean. Best cabin we have stayed in for a really long time. Will definitely be staying here again.
Thank you again Noonamah Toursit Park for your help - greatly appreciated!

Fantastic park with clean cabins and offering great amenities....laundry.
Great customer service. An easy spot to find right on the Stuart Hway beside the United servo and tavern.

We originally booked for two nights, stayed for one.  On paper this place ticks all the boxes, upon arrival we were badly let down, we decided to go out for the day in our motorhome and left our grass door mat out for our return only to find it had been stolen, the reception lady was friendly and helpful. For the remainder of the evening we we're afraid to leave our van unattended. We left the next morning with a refund, and I noticed on the way out OUR MAT under the steps of one of the permanants.
Apart from the obvious theft at the park, the toilet/shower blocks were old and dirty. Not value for money at $55, there are much nicer places to stay for less or the same money.

Great place to stay to explore Darwin and surrounds. Only 30 min from Darwin and very close to berry springs and Litchfield and Kakadu. Noonamah tavern has cold beers , good food and service. Worth he stop .

Best kept secret on the track , quiet off the road , great rooms , drive through sites , cabins , noonamah pub and restraunt all within 300 m servo has small supermarket , about 25km out of Darwin..my number one stop

Noonamah is the best tourist park I've been to I came there solo but the people there were so friendly I made friends with everyone despite being and introvert. I love this place and the pool seemed like it was always clear and clean, my dog had lots of room to run around in the dog park there and after a relaxing day I had dinner at Noonamah tavern (within walking distance of Noonamah tourist park) and I got to meet the owner of the tourist park and she was so nice and friendly we had a nice chat.

This park is one of the best places I've stayed while I was at Darwin the staff are wonderful and the gardeners are so nice honestly 10/10 for me. the rooms were so clean and the aircon was on when I arrived, the swimming pool was crystal clear everything was perfect for my stay.
It is nice been out their
Se non si e' completamente sordi da evitare

Arrived after closing time called the owners and they ask if I could pay over the phone.
I said no problems and they would call me back soon as they were driving
They texted back and as we were leaving at 7 am they said have a free nights stay on us.
Darwin hospitality at it’s best
Great people nice and clean quality set up
Nice spot to stay for the night. Pool was great and pub feed was a good size.

J’écris maintenant mais j’ai passé 3 semaines dans ce camping en aout 2023 et nous avons vraiment apprécié le lieu nous dormions dans le coin pour les véhicules autonomes et nous avons vu nos peut être plus beau lever de soleil!! Les douche toilette sont nickel ainsi que l’espace pour manger cuisiner et vraiment pratique sa permet de rencontrer des gens , la piscine et nickel la personne qui gère le camping est vraiment gentille! Nous avons essayé d’autres camping avant de venir ici et le prix proposé et vraiment bon en comparaison d’autres ou il y a beaucoup moins d’équipement. On dormait dans une tente de toit et j’ai pas souvenir d’avoir était dérange par la route 👍

Location is a bit noisy as we can still hear the Stuart highway noise at night while we are in the campervan.
Lady at reception was really nice as they gave us a Powered site near the new toilet shower amenities though we asked and paid for unpowered site. We did not use the power of cos as we don't need it.

New kitchen amenities too with large gas stoves, kettle etc but we didn't use them.

Saw lovely sunset near the new toilet shower area.
Truck Stop

What a great well kept Tourist Park,  rooms clean and Park well kept, friendly staff, and great meals at the hotel next door, i definitely would recommend it.
Steve.

I'm having a lovely stay here. 2 nights with my 2 dogs.Sally at reception was lovely. Theres a fabulous closed doggy area Bathrooms are lovely, modern and clean. The grounds are very nicely kept too. Bonus... the Pub is just a 2 minute stroll with nice cold beer.
Excellent facilities and service 👏
Loved staying at this park! Very kind lady running the park and the place is kept lush and green all year round. Felt very relaxed staying here. Pool is salt water too so it doesn’t sting your eyes
Nice quiet park ,friendly staff,  pub next door has nice cold beer, good meals, great staff.
Very quiet and very good caravan space. Fuel and tavern close by.

We had a 2 bedroom apartment, it had obviously been renovated recently and was as-new. The room was nice and quiet, and with the Tavern and service station next door, meals were catered for. Great base for a holiday in the NT
Great place one night.
